menuName: Stock Market Advanced Phrases / Продвинутая биржевая терминология
description: 50 advanced stock market phrases in English with Russian translations

lines.A: The market opened with strong bullish momentum.
lines.B: Рынок открылся с сильным бычьим импульсом.

lines.A: Investors are showing increased risk appetite.
lines.B: Инвесторы проявляют повышенную склонность к риску.

lines.A: The stock experienced significant volatility.
There was a sharp correction in prices.
The asset is trading at a premium.
The company reported strong quarterly earnings.
lines.B: Компания сообщила о сильной квартальной прибыли.

lines.A: The shares rallied after the announcement.
The market is pricing in future growth.
lines.B: Рынок закладывает будущий рост в цены.

lines.A: The index reached a new all-time high.
The sell-off was driven by external factors.
Liquidity in the market remains limited.
The stock is considered undervalued.
The position was closed at a loss.
The trader entered a short position.
The portfolio is well diversified.
The market reacted negatively to the news.
The price broke through resistance levels.
Support levels held during the decline.
lines.B: Уровни поддержки удержались во время падения.

lines.A: The trend remains upward.
The asset is trading sideways.
The market shows signs of consolidation.
Volume increased significantly.
The stock is highly liquid.
The rally lost momentum.
The decline accelerated rapidly.
The company issued a profit warning.
lines.B: Компания выпустила предупреждение о снижении прибыли.

lines.A: Earnings exceeded market expectations.
The valuation appears stretched.
The market remains highly speculative.
The investor reduced exposure to risk.
The position was hedged against losses.
The asset showed strong resilience.
The correction was long overdue.
Market sentiment turned bearish.
The upside potential remains limited.
The downside risk is increasing.
The trade was executed at market price.
lines.B: Сделка была исполнена по рыночной цене.

lines.A: The order book shows strong demand.
The spread narrowed significantly.
The asset remains fundamentally strong.
The market is driven by speculation.
The stock underperformed the index.
The rally was fueled by optimism.
The correction wiped out gains.
The outlook remains uncertain.
